apartment.name: Safehouse Apartment
apartment.desc: A small, cluttered apartment with neon light bleeding through the window blinds. A scanner ticks on the desk. The exit to the street is east.

npcs.name: clerk
npcs.desc: A sketchy guy in a trenchcoat leaning against a vending machine.

behaviors.talk: Need some hardware? Gold talks, buddy.

city_street.name: Downtown City Street
city_street.desc: Slick pavement reflecting the neon signs. Rain falls softly in the alleyway. The apartment is west, and a grand bank entrance is north.

items.name: briefcase
items.desc: A locked metal briefcase. It feels heavy and valuable.

npcs.name: guard
npcs.desc: A private security guard holding a flashlight, scanning the area.

behaviors.talk: Move along, citizen. Nothing to see here.

bank_vault.name: The High-Security Bank Vault
bank_vault.desc: Thick steel walls and laser security grids protect safety deposit boxes. The exit back to the street is south.

items.name: pistol
items.desc: A 9mm semi-automatic handgun. Reliable and deadly.

npcs.name: officer
npcs.desc: An elite SWAT officer guarding the central vault deposit boxes.

behaviors.talk: Freeze! You are trespassing under code red!
